notes: Perception-aligned synthetic scenarios. Simulated vision contains only visible scene facts, observable cues, uncertainty, and explicit unknowns.

scenarios.scene_brief: A person walks straight to the front door in daylight carrying a reusable shopping bag.
scenarios.camera_view: Wide front-door camera angled over the porch steps with clear daylight visibility.

simulated_vision.description: A person walks directly toward the front door carrying a bag. The subject is upright, moving at a normal pace, and close to the entry.

history_context: similar arrivals are common at this entry
memory_hints: routine arrival patterns may exist for this home

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: entry approach without threat cues and with routine-compatible context

scenarios.scene_brief: A person bends at the porch and places a box near the front door during the day.
scenarios.camera_view: Porch camera with a tight view of the mat, threshold, and first few steps.

simulated_vision.description: A person bends near the front door and places a box-shaped object on the porch. After placing the object, the subject turns away from the door.

history_context: porch deliveries are common
memory_hints: delivery-like patterns may recur at this camera

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: package placement plus immediate departure is consistent with benign delivery

scenarios.scene_brief: A person with a dog walks across the outer edge of the driveway without approaching the home.
scenarios.camera_view: Driveway camera with street edge and lateral walkway visible.

simulated_vision.description: A person walks laterally across the edge of the driveway with a dog on a leash. The movement stays parallel to the home and does not approach the entry.

history_context: street-adjacent pass-throughs occur regularly

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: lateral pass-through not directed at the home

scenarios.scene_brief: A small animal crosses the backyard fence line at night.
scenarios.camera_view: Infrared backyard camera with lawn and fence line visible.

simulated_vision.description: A small animal moves across the backyard in infrared view. No people or entry interaction are visible.

history_context: animal crossings occur in this zone

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: animal-only activity without human or threat cues

scenarios.scene_brief: A sedan enters the driveway briefly to turn around and then exits.
scenarios.camera_view: Driveway camera facing the parking area and street entrance.

simulated_vision.description: A vehicle enters the driveway, pauses briefly, and turns back toward the street. No person exits the vehicle and no one approaches the home.

history_context: short vehicle incursions happen occasionally

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: vehicle-only activity without occupant approach

scenarios.scene_brief: A person with a long handheld tool moves through the side yard during the day.
scenarios.camera_view: Backyard camera covering gate entrance and side yard.

simulated_vision.description: A person is visible in the side yard holding a long handheld tool. The subject moves steadily through the yard and does not interact with entry hardware.

history_context: similar daytime yard-service events have occurred before
memory_hints: service schedule known for this home

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: daytime yard work plus explicit upstream trust metadata

scenarios.scene_brief: A person looks at a package on the porch, picks it up, and leaves.
scenarios.camera_view: Porch camera showing the package area and path away from the door.

simulated_vision.description: A person looks down at a package near the door, lifts it, and walks away from the porch. No earlier package placement is visible in this frame.

history_context: no prior delivery frame linked to this event

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: package interaction is visible but authorization is unclear and threat evidence is weak

scenarios.scene_brief: A person rolls a bicycle toward the garage at dusk.
scenarios.camera_view: Garage exterior camera with driveway apron and garage opening visible.

simulated_vision.description: A person moves a bicycle toward the garage entrance at dusk. The motion is direct and there is no visible tamper interaction.

history_context: similar garage arrivals happen regularly
memory_hints: arrival routines may exist at this camera

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: direct garage approach without suspicious cues

scenarios.scene_brief: Headlight glare washes across the driveway camera and creates moving shadows.
scenarios.camera_view: Driveway camera facing toward the street at night.

simulated_vision.description: Strong light glare and moving shadows pass across the driveway. No clear person, vehicle occupant, or entry interaction is visible.

history_context: glare artifacts have occurred on this camera before

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: insufficient evidence due to glare-only motion

scenarios.scene_brief: Heavy rain streaks near the lens trigger motion near the front door.
scenarios.camera_view: Front-door camera under partial overhang at night in rain.

simulated_vision.description: Rain streaks and lens artifacts create motion near the front door. No person, package, or interaction with the door is clearly visible.

history_context: weather-triggered motion occurs occasionally

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: weather-driven motion without visible actor

scenarios.scene_brief: A person stands at the front door after hours facing the lock area.
scenarios.camera_view: Front-door camera with clear view of the handle and threshold under porch light.

simulated_vision.description: A person remains close to the front door and faces the handle area after hours. The subject appears to stay in place rather than pass through.

history_context: no recent benign routine linked to this event

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: after-hours entry dwell without benign context

scenarios.scene_brief: A person stands at the backyard gate and appears to pull at the latch area at night.
scenarios.camera_view: Backyard camera aimed at the gate line and side path with infrared detail.

simulated_vision.description: A person stands at the backyard gate and appears to interact with the latch area at night. The subject is focused on the boundary access point.

history_context: no recent benign maintenance at the gate

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: after-hours perimeter interaction at a boundary access point

scenarios.scene_brief: A person picks up a package from the porch and departs immediately.
scenarios.camera_view: Porch camera with package area and front walk visible.

simulated_vision.description: A person reaches for a package by the door, lifts it, and moves away from the porch. No package placement or handoff is visible in this frame.

history_context: a package was previously delivered to this porch

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: package removal following delivery context is suspicious enough to escalate

scenarios.scene_brief: A hand and forearm dominate the image as someone reaches directly toward the camera housing.
scenarios.camera_view: Front-door camera at very close range to a subject attempting lens obstruction.

simulated_vision.description: A hand reaches directly toward the camera and partially obscures the view. The scene shows abrupt close-range contact with the device.

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: direct camera tamper is an immediate escalation cue

scenarios.scene_brief: A person leans into the lock area with a metal object angled toward the door seam.
scenarios.camera_view: Tight front-door view with strong porch light on the lock area.

simulated_vision.description: A person is close to the door lock and holds a metal object near the seam and handle area. The interaction is focused on entry hardware.

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: direct forced-entry cue at a primary entry point

scenarios.scene_brief: An indoor camera sees a person crossing the living room at 2 AM with no trust metadata.
scenarios.camera_view: Indoor corner camera covering couch, hallway, and window line.

simulated_vision.description: A person is visible inside the living room during late-night hours. The subject is indoors and moving across the room.

history_context: no matching trusted presence metadata

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: interior after-hours person without trusted context requires escalation

scenarios.scene_brief: A vehicle is stopped near the garage after hours and a person stands outside it.
scenarios.camera_view: Garage camera covering driveway apron and garage face.

simulated_vision.description: A vehicle is stopped near the garage and a person stands outside beside it late at night. The subject remains close to the garage area.

history_context: no known arrival routine linked to this event

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: after-hours vehicle plus person lingering near garage

scenarios.scene_brief: A person previously passed by the driveway multiple times and now dwells at the front door just before midnight.
scenarios.camera_view: Front-door camera with recent driveway history available to reasoning.

simulated_vision.description: A person stands near the front door close to the handle area and remains there rather than passing through. The current frame shows prolonged presence at the entry.

history_context: same subject pattern seen at driveway twice in recent sequence

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: entry dwell combined with repeated prior presence indicates escalation

scenarios.scene_brief: Only part of a human figure is visible behind a parked car at night.
scenarios.camera_view: Driveway camera partially blocked by a parked SUV.

simulated_vision.description: A partially occluded person is visible behind a parked vehicle at the driveway edge. The subject is incomplete and intent cannot be determined from the frame.

history_context: no supporting sequence evidence

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: possible person present but evidence is too incomplete to escalate

scenarios.scene_brief: An infrared silhouette appears near the side gate, but the subject is indistinct.
scenarios.camera_view: Backyard IR camera with noise and low contrast.

simulated_vision.description: A human-like silhouette is visible near the side gate in infrared view. The subject is indistinct and any interaction with the gate is unclear.

history_context: no corroborating event sequence

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: human-like presence is too ambiguous to escalate without corroboration

scenarios.scene_brief: A blurred person-shaped figure appears on the porch with a box-like object at dusk.
scenarios.camera_view: Porch camera at dusk with motion blur from a fast-moving subject.

simulated_vision.description: A blurred figure is visible near the porch holding a box-shaped object. The exact action at the door is not clear because of motion blur.

history_context: no linked prior frame

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: possible delivery-like activity but evidence is too blurred for escalation

scenarios.scene_brief: A minivan pauses in the driveway while two people move quickly away from it in the morning.
scenarios.camera_view: Driveway camera with vehicle pad and walkway visible.

simulated_vision.description: A vehicle is stopped briefly in the driveway while two people move quickly away from it. No one is approaching the home or interacting with the entry.

history_context: similar short morning driveway events occur frequently
memory_hints: morning routine may be known for this home

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: short morning vehicle activity without threat cues

scenarios.scene_brief: A person rolls a large bin from the side yard toward the curb around sunset.
scenarios.camera_view: Side-drive camera with gate, side path, and curb lane visible.

simulated_vision.description: A person rolls a large wheeled bin along the side driveway toward the curb. The movement is direct and does not interact with doors or locks.

history_context: bin movement occurs on a weekly schedule

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: routine outdoor task with no security-specific cue

scenarios.scene_brief: A large animal climbs the porch railing close to the front door late at night.
scenarios.camera_view: Porch infrared camera with railing and doorway visible.

simulated_vision.description: A large animal climbs near the porch railing close to the front door at night. No person is visible.

history_context: large wildlife near entry is uncommon at this home

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: large wildlife directly at an entry can warrant notification

scenarios.scene_brief: A person arrives at the front door at night carrying a duffel bag and pauses briefly.
scenarios.camera_view: Front-door camera under porch lighting.

simulated_vision.description: A person arrives at the front door at night carrying a bag and pauses briefly near the entry. No tamper or forced-entry cue is visible.

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: entry arrival is benign once explicit trusted metadata is applied

scenarios.scene_brief: A person stands on the porch longer than a quick knock but remains fully visible.
scenarios.camera_view: Porch camera with doorway and mat visible in daylight.

simulated_vision.description: A person remains on the porch in front of the door longer than a brief stop. The subject stays visible and does not handle the lock or camera.

history_context: no prior suspicious sequence

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: notable porch dwell, but daylight and lack of threat cues keep it below alert

scenarios.scene_brief: A person leans toward a side window while moving slowly along the wall at night.
scenarios.camera_view: Side-path camera showing exterior wall, window, and narrow walkway.

simulated_vision.description: A person moves slowly along the side of the home and leans toward a window. The subject stays close to the wall after hours.

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: after-hours window-focused perimeter behavior is strongly suspicious

scenarios.scene_brief: A person walks past the front door toward a neighboring property without stopping.
scenarios.camera_view: Front-door camera with sidewalk and shared path visible.

simulated_vision.description: A person walks past the front entry without stopping or interacting with the door. Movement is lateral across the camera view.

history_context: street-adjacent lateral pass-throughs are common

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: lateral movement with no interaction at the home

scenarios.scene_brief: A person is visible inside an open garage moving boxes near a parked car.
scenarios.camera_view: Garage exterior camera facing the threshold and front of the interior.

simulated_vision.description: A person moves box-like objects inside an open garage during the day. No forced entry, concealment, or tamper behavior is visible.

history_context: open-garage daytime activity is normal here

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: ordinary garage occupancy and object movement

scenarios.scene_brief: A person remains crouched near the back deck for an extended period after hours.
scenarios.camera_view: Backyard IR camera with deck stairs and patio visible.

simulated_vision.description: A person remains low to the ground near the back deck and stays in place after hours. The posture suggests concealment or prolonged waiting.

history_context: no matching benign activity sequence

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: after-hours concealed loitering near the home exterior

scenarios.scene_brief: A child kneels on the front walkway drawing on the ground in daylight.
scenarios.camera_view: Front-door camera capturing porch steps and walkway.

simulated_vision.description: A small person kneels on the front walkway and appears focused on the ground. The scene shows stationary activity near the walkway rather than entry handling.

history_context: similar benign outdoor family activity occurs here

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: benign stationary activity without threat cues

scenarios.scene_brief: A person runs quickly along the street edge crossing the driveway view at night.
scenarios.camera_view: Driveway camera facing the street with partial sidewalk coverage.

simulated_vision.description: A person runs laterally across the edge of the driveway view at night. The movement is fast and does not stop near the home.

history_context: no corroborating sequence near the entry

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: night movement is notable, but lateral pass-through lacks home-directed threat cues

scenarios.scene_brief: A person crouches, grabs a parcel, and leaves the porch quickly.
scenarios.camera_view: Porch camera with front walk and parcel location fully visible.

simulated_vision.description: A person crouches near a parcel on the porch, picks it up, and moves away quickly. The frame does not show package placement, only removal.

history_context: prior delivery event exists for this porch

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: rapid parcel removal after delivery context justifies alert

scenarios.scene_brief: A person reaches toward a parked car door handle in the driveway after hours.
scenarios.camera_view: Driveway camera with parked car side profile visible.

simulated_vision.description: A person stands close to a parked vehicle and reaches toward the door handle after hours. The action is focused on the vehicle door area.

history_context: no routine late-night vehicle access on record

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: after-hours direct interaction with parked vehicle is suspicious

scenarios.scene_brief: An indoor camera shows a person moving a vacuum through the living room during the day.
scenarios.camera_view: Living-room corner camera covering couch and hallway.

simulated_vision.description: A person is moving a vacuum-like object through the living room in daylight. The subject is indoors and engaged in repetitive room movement.

history_context: recurring daytime indoor service visits are expected

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: interior occupancy is benign once trusted metadata is applied

scenarios.scene_brief: A spider web close to the lens reflects infrared light and creates ghost motion near the garage.
scenarios.camera_view: Garage exterior IR camera with a web crossing one corner of the frame.

simulated_vision.description: A bright web-like artifact close to the lens creates shifting motion in infrared view. No clear person or vehicle is visible at the garage.

history_context: artifact-like events happen when webs form near the lens

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: camera artifact with no discernible actor

scenarios.scene_brief: A person opens the side gate at dusk and steps partly into the backyard.
scenarios.camera_view: Backyard camera pointed toward gate opening and side fence line.

simulated_vision.description: A person opens the side gate and moves into the backyard area. The frame shows interaction with a boundary access point.

history_context: no benign gate-access context tied to this event

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: boundary crossing into protected yard area

scenarios.scene_brief: A person steps onto the porch in the morning, checks near the door, and returns inside.
scenarios.camera_view: Front-door camera with porch landing and door fully visible.

simulated_vision.description: A person briefly steps onto the porch, looks near the door area, and then turns back. The stop is short and there is no visible tamper interaction.

history_context: similar short door-area checks are common
memory_hints: brief porch routines may be learned

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: brief entry-area interaction without threat evidence

scenarios.scene_brief: Two people stand on the front steps gesturing intensely at each other.
scenarios.camera_view: Front-door camera with porch steps and upper-body gestures visible.

simulated_vision.description: Two people are on the front steps making animated gestures toward each other. No weapon, forced entry, or clear physical assault is visible in the frame.

history_context: no prior violent behavior in sequence

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: social conflict is notable but lacks concrete security-threat evidence

scenarios.scene_brief: Tree shadows move rapidly over the patio in strong wind with no visible subject.
scenarios.camera_view: Backyard camera covering patio and fence under motion-activated lighting.

simulated_vision.description: Moving shadows sweep across the backyard patio. No person, animal, or vehicle is clearly visible in the frame.

history_context: shadow-triggered motion has happened before on windy nights

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: environmental motion only with no visible actor

scenarios.scene_brief: A person exits through the side gate carrying a large object away from the property.
scenarios.camera_view: Side-drive camera with side gate and path to the street visible.

simulated_vision.description: A person leaves through the side gate carrying a large object away from the property. The movement is directed outward from the yard.

history_context: no scheduled move-out or service event is known

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: property appears to be leaving through a protected boundary without benign context

scenarios.scene_brief: A person approaches the front door carrying a gift bag and balloon in the early evening.
scenarios.camera_view: Front-door camera with clear porch lighting at dusk.

simulated_vision.description: A person approaches the front door holding a bag and a balloon-like object. The movement is direct and there is no visible tamper behavior.

history_context: no suspicious prior sequence

expected_judgement.explanation_focus: visitor-like arrival without threat cues
